title: Improve typography by adding a brighter font and higher-contrast text styling

requirements.text: Add a modern sans-serif web font for the app and apply it globally so all text uses the new font consistently across Login, Calendar, Daily, and Settings views.

quotes: add font and letter are bright

acceptanceCriteria: A web font is loaded from a reliable source (e.g., via a <link> in frontend/index.html) and applied globally (e.g., on body/html) without breaking layout.
Text across the app (headings, paragraphs, buttons, inputs) renders in the new font on refresh.
No user-facing strings are changed; only typography styling changes.

requirements.text: Increase overall text brightness/legibility by adjusting the global color tokens used for text (foreground, muted-foreground, and card-foreground) and ensuring readable contrast on glassmorphism cards and over background images in both light and dark themes.

quotes: add font and letter are bright

acceptanceCriteria: In light theme, general body text and UI labels appear darker/clearer (higher contrast) on light card/background surfaces.
In dark theme, general body text and UI labels remain bright and readable on dark card/background surfaces.
Muted text (e.g., text-muted-foreground used in descriptions and helper text) is still visually secondary but noticeably more legible than before.
LoginScreen informational paragraphs (currently using text-muted-foreground) remain readable against the background image and glass-card styling.
Calendar weekday headers (text-muted-foreground) and task controls/icons using muted text remain readable.

requirements.text: Improve perceived text clarity by adding global typographic rendering enhancements (e.g., font smoothing and consistent letter rendering) without changing any existing app behavior or animations.

quotes: add font and letter are bright

acceptanceCriteria: Global CSS includes font rendering improvements (e.g., antialiasing/font-smoothing) applied at the document/body level.
No changes to planner data, LocalStorage logic, authentication flow, routing, or animations occur as a result of the typography changes.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/components/ui (shadcn components are read-only).
Keep all user-facing text in English and do not change existing copy; only adjust styling/typography.
Do not change authentication logic (Internet Identity), LocalStorage persistence, or navigation behavior.
nonGoals: Adding new screens or features beyond typography/contrast improvements.
Changing background images, overlays, or month-image mapping behavior.
Altering task CRUD behavior or stored data formats.
